name: Karlach, The Infernal Night.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

After you finally found a way to cool Karlach down, she couldn't wait to spend the night with you.

I FUCKING LOVE BALDUR'S GATE 3 RAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH

If y'all want, for my 2K follower special, I could do all the BG3 Companions, including an extra Karlach.

*Also lowkey planning a Shadowheart and Karlach Duo Bot :3*

(Art by Afrobull.)
